title: Discover More: App Marketplace Reviews Now Visible on Listings!

posts.author: galhe (Gal Even Hen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello community,
We’re thrilled to announce a new feature that enhances your experience in our marketplace: App Reviews are now visible on each app’s listing page!
With this update, you can now access detailed reviews and ratings through a dedicated tab on the app page. This transparency allows you to make more informed decisions when choosing apps, boosting your confidence and trust in the apps you install.
What’s New:

  • Read Full Reviews: Access detailed user feedback directly on the app page.
  • Interactive Experience: Developers can respond to reviews, creating a two-way feedback loop.

see more details here

This feature is available to all users and aligns with our commitment to transparency and user engagement. We hope this update enhances your experience and encourages you to share your own reviews, contributing to a vibrant and informed community.
Check out the new UI and start exploring today!
Thank you for being a part of our community!
